summary: Added isLikelyID(v) helper alongside isValidUUID. Returns true for canonical UUIDs and for paperclip local-dev slug-shaped IDs; rejects sentinels and arbitrary strings.
reason: The default generator emits isValidUUID(args[0]) on path-parameter args for {uuid} slots. Local-dev instances return slug-shaped IDs (e.g. local-board); the strict guard rejected legit IDs with exit 2 BEFORE the HTTP call.
validated_outcome: shipcheck green; dogfood matrix PASS after switching six pre-checks from isValidUUID to isLikelyID.
